track RNAseq_PD
shortLabel ASAP PD5D RNA-seq
longLabel RNA-seq tracks for PD5D dataset from Midbrain and MTG part of the Human Brain
dataVersion Version 1
type bigWig
visibility full
boxedCfg on
priority 2
superTrack on show

############################################
# COMBINED BRAIN REGION TRACKS
############################################

track combined_brainregion
shortLabel combined_brainregion
longLabel RNA-seq combined tracks for cell types from Midbrain
visibility hide
boxedCfg on
priority 4
compositeTrack on
dragAndDrop subTracks
parent RNAseq_PD
type bigWig
subGroup1 region Region MIDBRAIN=Midbrain MTG=Middle_Temporal_Gyrus
subGroup2 cell CellType ASTRO=Astrocytes CD8T=CD8T ENDO=Endothelialcell GABA=GABAneurons GLU=Gluneurons MICRO=Microglia MONO=Monocytes OLIGO=Oligodendrocytes OPC=OPCs PERI=Pericytes
subGroup3 view Views APC=APC PW=PW
subGroup4 name Name N1=Astrocytes N2=CD8T N3=Endothelialcell N4=GABAneurons N5=Gluneurons N6=Microglia N7=Monocytes N8=Oligodendrocytes N9=OPCs N10=Pericytes
subGroup5 strand Strand plus=Plus minus=Minus
dimensions dimX=region dimY=name dimA=view dimB=strand
sortOrder region=+ name=+ view=+ strand=+
